summary: Full e2e testing of K1 Real Estate landing page. All backend APIs pass. All core frontend flows working: hero, navbar, contact form submission, admin panel shows submitted leads.

issues: Admin panel has no auth protection - any user can access /admin and see all leads. Low priority for MVP but should be noted.

action_items: Minor: Services.jsx and Gallery.jsx components lack data-testid attributes on individual cards/images (not blocking functionality)
Minor: Listings.jsx property cards lack data-testid='property-card' (only google-listings-link is testable by id)
Consideration: /admin has no authentication - all leads visible to anyone who knows the URL
critical_code_review_comments: Services, Gallery, Listings cards missing data-testid on individual items - makes automated testing harder
Admin panel at /admin has no auth guard - security consideration for production
seed_data_creation: 2 test contact submissions created in DB during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows verified working. Backend: POST /api/contact, GET /api/contacts both pass. Frontend: navbar, hero section, contact form submission with success message, admin /admin page with lead table all verified. Missing data-testid on service cards, gallery images, and property listing cards - only minor concern.
